seoTitle: Cooya Pooya vs Coral Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cooya Pooya and Coral Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cooya Pooya vs Coral Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cooya Pooya and Coral Bay.
heading: Cooya Pooya vs Coral Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cooya Pooya, Western Australia and Coral Bay, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cooya Pooya has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Coral Bay (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cooya Pooya or Coral Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cooya Pooya has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Coral Bay scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cooya Pooya scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Coral Bay scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cooya Pooya or Coral Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cooya Pooya has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
